why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:code_of_conduct must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and official String body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one String fixture only, not UI consent flow, legal acceptance semantics, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_code_of_conduct_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 19, official String body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x13.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket(String), ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.STRING_UTF8, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundCodeOfConductPacket.codeOfConduct().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound code_of_conduct dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains cookie_request id 0x00 through show_dialog id 0x12, but not code_of_conduct id 0x13.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x13 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound code_of_conduct packet id 19
